title: selinum fistulosum
intro: Selinum fistulosum, also known as wild celery or smallage, is a perennial herb belonging to the carrot family (Apiaceae). The medicinal properties of Selinum fistulosum include its diuretic and anti-inflammatory effects, making it a popular ingredient in traditional medicine for treating various health issues. The health benefits of this plant are numerous, including its ability to reduce blood pressure, alleviate joint pain and swelling, and support digestive health. Selinum fistulosum can be prepared as an herbal tea, infusion, or tincture, and its seeds and leaves are also used in cooking and as a food ingredient.
